name: Fresh Peach Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a greased 9x9x2 pan with sliced peaches in a layer about an inch thick.
2. Combine 2 tablespoons sugar and 1/3 cup orange juice, then pour over the peaches.
3. In a separate bowl, cream 3 tablespoons margarine with 1/3 cup brown sugar.
4. Sift together 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
5. Combine the crushed cornflakes with the sifted flour mixture until well mixed.
6. Mix the sugar and flour mixture until crumbly.
7. Spread the topping evenly over the peaches.
8. Bake at 350°F (preheated oven) for about 25 minutes.
9. Serve hot, topped with cream or ice cream.
